feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Bussiness One FAT-Client UI Display Issues
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
SAP Support suggested I try posting this in the community, since others here might have encountered a similar issue and could possibly offer a solution.

The issue is that for some of our customers—only sporadically and not reproducibly—the main menu gets pushed together in a strange way.

We’ve seen this with several customers using different SAP 10 versions.

We’ve already tested a few things, such as:

- Set the scale to 100% (still the case)

- Set the high DPI setting to System in SAP. (As with Corsuit)

- Disabled Windows multitasking. (Because errors such as the entire bar turning black occurred)

- Set the refresh rate to 60 Hz

- Installed the latest drivers (Today, we uninstalled all drivers on a test computer and installed the drivers directly from Intel)

- As silly as it sounds, all the computers where this error occurred were connected via HDMI cable. We even changed that to DisplayPort.

- What we found is that computers with, for example, an Nvidia graphics card do not have this error. Only Intel processors with integrated graphics cards (different generations 12/13/14) have this error.

-This error also occurred on non-Lenovo devices such as a Surface during a presentation where it was connected to a projector. Reports were open there (ID 42/2419) customer order, which was opened from the shipping list. When the packing list was opened, the error occurred. (Unfortunately, when testing with the same items on the device, this could no longer be reproduced).

-This error also occurred on non-Lenovo devices such as a Surface during a presentation where it was connected to a projector. Reports were open there (ID 42/2419) customer order, which was opened from the shipping list. When the packing list was opened, the error occurred. (Unfortunately, when testing with the same items on the device, it could no longer be reproduced).

-We also set up other monitors with only 1080p resolution because we thought it might have something to do with the screen.

-We also disabled settings such as hardware GPU acceleration in Windows.

-I also checked the system utilization and the network card, which were always only around 40% utilization. The Surface was the only one where it was at 80% at the time.

-I also changed the energy-saving settings to high performance or best performance on the notebooks.

-I also checked the network settings. I disabled Wi-Fi so that they are only connected via LAN. I also set the card so that Windows cannot disable it for energy-saving options. I also adjusted the other energy-saving settings that are available there.

-I couldn't see anything unusual in the Windows event log during that time.

Almost all of our customers use the Coresuite Country Package. However, Coresystems was unable to reproduce the issue on their end.

Maybe someone else has an idea, or has encountered a problem like this before.

Thank you very much and best regards,
Marco

entry.title: Hands-on Practice for SAP Business One - Logistics SLD iSSUE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using SAP Learning Hub and trying to complete the Hands-on Practice for SAP Business One – Logistics.

However, I cannot access or log in to the SAP Business One system that should be provided for the exercises. I am not sure whether this is a system issue or if I missed any setup steps.

Has anyone experienced the same problem? What should I do to access the SAP Business One system?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: I want to modify the warehouse number that has already been used. How can this be achieved?
entry.content:
I want to modify the warehouse number that has already been used. How can this be achieved?
If this operation is not possible, is it only possible to create a new repository, then transfer the old one to the new one, and then disable it?

entry.title: The job Service-alert cannot be added.
entry.content: I tried restarting the sld service and reinstalling the service manager, but still couldn't add it.

entry.title: Unable to Reconcile Vendor Down Payment with AP Invoice Containing Withholding Tax in SAP Business O
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue in SAP Business One 10.0 while trying to reconcile a Vendor Down Payment against an AP Invoice.

Scenario:

  1. An AP Invoice was created approximately one month ago.

  2. Later, a Vendor Down Payment was made to the same vendor.

  3. The vendor has adjusted the down payment amount against the AP Invoice.

  4. I am now attempting to reconcile the Vendor Down Payment with the AP Invoice through Internal Reconciliation.

Document Details:

  • AP Invoice Amount: INR 2,915,439.50

  • Withholding Tax (WHT): INR 2,500.00

  • Vendor Down Payment: INR 11,141,570.00

Issue:
When attempting the reconciliation, SAP Business One displays the following error message:

"You can only link to the section of the document which has no withholding tax."

I would like to understand:

  • Is this a standard SAP Business One limitation when an AP Invoice contains Withholding Tax?

  • What is the recommended approach to reconcile a Vendor Down Payment against an AP Invoice that includes WHT?

  • Are there any additional steps or workarounds required to complete the reconciliation?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: AI Integration Query for Crystal Reports Templates
entry.content:
Dear community,

I'm an end-user of SAP Business One 10.0 at a company. I'm reaching out to get your insights on a specific matter. With recent advancements in AI, there may have been updates to in SAP systems that we are not yet aware of. Up until now, we have been using manual templates in Word, Excel, and PDF formats. We now want to customize these forms, lists, and templates specifically for our company and manage them directly within SAP. As you can appreciate, designing templates from scratch can be hard for a standard user.

Given recent technological developments, is there a feature or tool that allows us to upload an existing Proforma sample (e.g., in PDF or Word) into Crystal Reports and use AI prompts—such as "prepare the architecture of this template"—to automatically generate a draft layout? Alternatively, is it possible to use text prompts like "place this logo 2cm from the top and 2cm from the left corner" to construct the layout?

If such an AI-assisted draft generation is possible, the subsequent data mapping processes would become significantly easier for us. We have a need to design and implement more than 30 different form templates.T hank you in advance for your support and guidance.

entry.title: Crystal Reports Showing "Logon Failed" After SA Password Change
entry.content:
We are facing an issue with Crystal Reports after the SA password was changed on the SQL Server.

The reports were working correctly prior to the password change. After updating the SA password, the Crystal Reports started displaying a "Logon Failed" error when users attempt to run them.

We suspect that the reports are still using the previous database credentials. Since there are multiple .rpt files in the environment, we would like to understand whether resetting the SA password back to its previous value would resolve the issue for all Crystal Reports without requiring updates to each individual .rpt file.

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 - B1LOGGING Database RAM Usage
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about RAM Usage of the SQL Server using for SAP Business One 10.0

I'm currently running SAP on Windows Server 2019 (Intel Xeon Silver 4314 (32 Cores), 64 GB of RAM) but I feel the server is kind of slow (at least, comparing to the old server I used for the previous SAP).

After I checked RAM Usage of SQL Server, I've found that the production Database takes 10 GB of RAM and B1LOGGING Database also takes 10 GB of RAM.

Is this considered as a normal condition in production or RAM Usage of B1LOGGING is too high?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Logon Failed Error Encountered by Multiple Users
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have verified that the required permissions related to the folders have been granted.

However, multiple users are currently encountering a "Logon Failed" error while performing different tasks in the system. The issue is not limited to a specific activity and has been observed across various operations.

Please find the attached screenshots for your reference.

 

Could you please help us understand the possible cause of this issue and advise on the appropriate resolution?

entry.title: Alert Management Email Notification Not Received
entry.content:
We are facing an issue with Alert Management in SAP Business One. The alert is being triggered successfully, but the email notification is not being received by the users.

We have verified the SMTP configuration, SAP Business One Mailer service, user email addresses, and alert settings, and all configurations appear to be correct. However, the email is still not being delivered.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or can suggest additional checks to identify the root cause?

entry.title: Customer Opening/Closing Balance API in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
We are building a BI dashboard that displays customer ledger balances, outstanding amounts, and financial summaries from SAP Business One.

We could not find any Service Layer API that returns a customer's Opening Balance, Closing Balance, or Outstanding Balance as of a specific date. While we can retrieve invoices, payments, credit notes, and journal entries, calculating historical balances externally may lead to reconciliation issues.

Could you please advise if SAP B1 provides any API, Service Layer endpoint, report, or recommended approach to retrieve:

  • Customer Opening Balance as of a given date
  • Customer Closing Balance as of a given date
  • Customer Outstanding Balance as of a given date

Any guidance or documentation would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you.

entry.title: Erro ao atualizar Nota fiscal de Entrada
entry.content:
Bom dia !

Estou tentando atualizar um documento de entrada e esta ocorrendo o erro: Custo do item não permitido [Nota fiscal de Entrada - linhas - ultimo preço de venda do item (OINM)] [line: 1] [Mensagem 439-119]" 

Olhei o avgprice da OITM e esta zerado mas nao negativo, após adicionar a nota o usuario criou uma reavaliação com o custo maior que o da entrada.

Não ha valor negativo no custo.

entry.title: New Company - Document Numbering
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I am setting up a new company with a blank database for the 1st time.

On the numbering series - setup screen, I dont see all of the marketing document.  When I put in transactions, its using the same sequence for all documents, so PO 1000, GRPO 1001, PO1002, SO1003

Is this the setting I need to uncheck to show the categories?  If so, then do I need to start with a blank database?


Thanks in advance for your help...


Brian Branco

entry.title: Purchase Request – additional expenses (freight) cannot be posted via Service Layer / DI API
entry.content:
Environment

  • SAP Business One 10.0
  • Database: MS SQL Server
  • Service Layer: v2 (OData v4)

Problem

When I create a Purchase Request (oPurchaseRequest) through the Service Layer, the DocumentAdditionalExpenses (freight) collection in my POST payload is silently ignored. The document is created fine, but no row is written to PRQ3 and the document totals do not include the expense. The same collection is also rejected on GET.

Steps to reproduce

  • POST to /b1s/v2/PurchaseRequests with this payload:
 
 
{  "Series": 62,  "ReqType": 12,  "ReqCode": "manager",  "Requester": "manager",  "DocumentLines": [    { "ItemCode": "RM00003", "Quantity": 10, "UnitPrice": 100, "TaxCode": "IGST@28", "WarehouseCode": "REJ" }  ],  "DocumentAdditionalExpenses": [    { "ExpenseCode": 1, "LineTotal": 200, "TaxCode": "IGST@28" }  ]}
  • The document is created (e.g. DocEntry 45). The response contains the line but no DocumentAdditionalExpenses, and DocTotal reflects only line + line tax (1126.40) — the freight is missing.
  • SELECT * FROM PRQ3 WHERE DocEntry = 45 returns no rows.
  • On GET, both options are rejected:
    • ?$expand=DocumentAdditionalExpenses → "Cannot expand invalid navigation property 'DocumentAdditionalExpenses' for entity type 'Document'"
    • ?$select=DocumentAdditionalExpenses → "Property 'DocumentAdditionalExpenses' of 'Document' is invalid"

What I found

The DocumentsAdditionalExpenses child object is documented as applying only to these source tables: INV3, RIN3, DLN3, RDN3, RDR3, QUT3, PCH3, RPC3, PDN3, RPD3, POR3, DRF3. PRQ3 (Purchase Request) is not in that list, which suggests additional expenses aren't supported for Purchase Requests via DI API / Service Layer.

The Document entity is also declared OpenType="true" in $metadata, which I assume is why the unknown collection is accepted but discarded on POST instead of throwing an error.

I can populate freight on a Purchase Request through the B1 client UI (PRQ3 rows do exist for UI-created documents), so the capability exists at the application level but not through the API.

Questions

  • Is the lack of additional-expenses support for Purchase Requests (and Purchase Quotations) in Service Layer / DI API intended and documented?
  • If it is by design, what is the recommended way to capture freight at the Purchase Request stage via the API?
  • Could the API return an explicit validation error when an unsupported collection is sent, rather than silently discarding it?

Thanks in advance.


SAP Business One  OData

entry.title: Help regarding SAP Business One integration
entry.content:
Hey guys,

I'm new to SAP Business One so treat me like a noob. I have a COM based tool and I want to create an integration with SAP Business One client application for UI automation. I have been trying a few things, but I'm stuck and not able to connect to the SAP Business One application itself. Just a note that I've not built the exe using the Visual Studio extension, but regular 64-bit build.

I've created an add-on using the extension generator tool (ard file + exe), but for some reason it only registers under lightweight extension in browser and shows incompatible while directly registering in the application itself. I'd like to know what difference would both make in terms of add-on?
I'd also like to understand if attaching to SAP Business One process would be better or connecting to it using connection string is recommended? Or is there any particular scenarios where each one work work? I've recently come across the following threads talking about connecting to SAP Business One using connection string but unable to understand much:
Solved: confused about connection string - SAP Community
Connecting to the UI API | SAP Help Portal
AddonIdentifier Property - SAP B1 SDK Help
I mean same connection string would work for any application? Is it? And what does AddonIdentifier() do exactly? The setup and connection links on the AddonIdentifier property page are not wokring. Is this approach as a whole fine for lightweight extensions registered in the browser or some other scenario?
So yeah, need help with these things. Whatever you know, please let me know. Any and all pieces of information are welcome. Thanks a lot guys.

entry.title: Need to update the Depreciation Type for multiple Fixed Assets using DTW.
entry.content:
SAP provides the ItemDepreciationParameter (ITM7) template, but I cannot find the corresponding object in DTW during Data Update to upload this template.

Has anyone successfully updated the Depreciation Type for existing Asset Master Data using DTW? If yes, where is the import option located, or is there any alternative supported method?

entry.title: SAP Business One AddOnIdentifier property distribution
entry.content:
Hey guys,

I have generated Implementation Add-On Identifier from the Add-On Identifier Generator. My concern is how do I ship the add-on now? Do I need to recompile the add-on code for each client or some other type of add-on would suffice for distribution? Also, I couldn't understand what are these types, i.e., Development, Implementation and Solution Add-on Type.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Business One Down Payment Reconciliation Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue in SAP Business One regarding internal reconciliation between A/P Invoices and a Vendor Down Payment.

Scenario:

  • SAP Business One Version: 10.0
  • Three A/P Invoices were posted on 10-May, 21-May, and 25-May.
  • The total invoice value is approximately ₹66 Lakhs.
  • All three A/P Invoices were posted with Withholding Tax (TDS).
  • Later, the company created a Vendor Down Payment Request for approximately ₹1.14 Crores and made the payment through Outgoing Payment by selecting the Down Payment Request.
  • Now the vendor has requested that the previous A/P Invoices be adjusted/reconciled against this Down Payment.

Issue:
When attempting to perform the internal reconciliation, SAP Business One displays the following error:

You can only link to the section of the document which has no withholding tax.

It appears that SAP does not allow reconciliation because the A/P Invoices contain Withholding Tax, whereas the Down Payment was paid without Withholding Tax.

Questions:

  1. Is this standard SAP Business One behavior?
  2. Is there any supported method to reconcile these documents without cancelling and recreating them?
  3. Are there any SAP Notes or best practices addressing this scenario?
  4. Has anyone encountered a similar issue, and if so, what was the resolution?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Business One – Set Attachment Browse Dialog to Open Last Browsed Folder Per User
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a query regarding the Attachment functionality in SAP Business One.

Our client uses attachments extensively, with more than 50 users working in SAP Business One. Previously, when users clicked the Browse button in the Attachment window, the file dialog automatically opened the last folder that particular user had browsed, which made attaching documents very convenient.

However, after a recent change, the Browse dialog now always opens the standard/default folder instead of the user's last browsed location.

Since each user stores documents in different folders, they now have to navigate to their respective folders every time they attach a file, which affects productivity.

Is there any standard SAP Business One setting, configuration, or parameter that allows the Browse dialog to remember and open the last browsed folder for each user?

We are looking for a standard solution without any customization, if possible.

Any suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: optional or default location in service type A/P invoice of sap bussiness one
entry.content: Is there way to make location option or if not default in service type A/P invoice of sap business one
